lessons.title: 8 HARMONY
topics: In music, Harmony refers to the combination of different musical notes played or sung at the
same time to produce a pleasing sound. It usually supports the melody (the tune) and adds depth,
emotion and texture to a piece of music.
Harmony is created when two or more notes sound together, forming chords (like C major or
